description: A junior technician is struggling with a complex repair and uses an Augmented Reality (AR) headset to get help from a senior expert.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a remote assistance call from the AR device.

expected_outcome.value: The junior technician starts a video call with a remote expert.

nodes.task_description: Share their point-of-view video stream with the remote expert.

expected_outcome.value: The remote expert can see exactly what the on-site technician sees.

nodes.task_description: Receive on-screen annotations and instructions from the expert to guide the repair.

expected_outcome.value: The expert draws circles and arrows on the screen to highlight the correct components, guiding the technician to a successful repair.
